item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 40min Not sure when ITV added two races from Haydock on to today's schedule (they are still n
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 40min Not sure when ITV added two races from Haydock on to today's schedule (they are still not on ITV's racing schedule page), so those aren't covered, sorry. Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 5h COPY for today's four ITV races at Newmarket, with all the usual stats/info. For @AKBets ; https:// tips.akbets.co.uk/tony-calvin-we dnesday-details/ … 693

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 49min “It’s a great honour to be asked to train for Sheikh Ahmed. I have been watching his hor
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 49min “It’s a great honour to be asked to train for Sheikh Ahmed. I have been watching his horses win major races around the world my entire life.
Sheikh Ahmed is so passionate about the sport. I feel privileged to have been asked to build on the remarkable success he has enjoyed as Mostrar más Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h Ed Crisford is to take the next step in his promising career in Dubai this year after accepting a job as private trainer to Sheikh Ahmed bin Rashid Al Maktoum
Read with Racing Post+ 1 1 6 4 mil
